{{Infobox location
| name = Capital (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Capital (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is the largest city in the world and serves as the seat of the [[Aurelian Empire]]. It is characterized by constant noise, with streets that are never silent even in the early morning hours. A massive portion of the city's legendary size is occupied by the [[Imperial Palace]], a structure so vast it is often considered a city in its own right. The inhabitants of the palace staff and the general population of the Capital are distinct groups that rarely interact. The city is a focal point for imperial power and conflict. The [[Emperor's throne]], known as the [[Optasia]], is located within his private chambers in the palace; this device was used to monitor and project power across the globe to combat the [[Great Elders]]. While the Capital is protected by forces such as the [[Blackwatch]] and Luminians who cleanse it of [[Elderspawn]], it remains a primary target for the [[Great Elders]]. Following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], the city's stability declined significantly.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Located within the [[Aurelian Empire]], the Capital stands as the greatest city in the world. This urban center is a place where pine scents linger and citizens can hire various clients, including magicians who perform magic for hire. It serves as the lifelong home of [[Shera]], though she eventually prepares to return there for a desk job. The city also houses a [[Kanatalia]] chapter house and remains a location where even [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] would not look out of place. Ultimately, it serves as the intended destination for the [[Captain]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a city within the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a location where citizens can hire clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a place [[Shera]] lived her entire [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a location where magicians perform magic for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a location where pine scent can be found.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is the greatest city in the world and is located within the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a location with a [[Kanatalia]] chapter house.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a place where [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] would not look out of place.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is heading back to a desk job in the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Capital is a destination the [[Captain]] intends to head for.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Capital is located in the Heartlands.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The air in the Capital is noted for its quality.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Capital is located in the northeast of the [[Aurelian continent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As the largest city in the world, the Capital is a mundane location situated near [[Rainworth]] characterized by its busy streets and traffic. While the [[Independents]] have fortified a hotel on its outskirts, many companies within the city maintain contracts with the [[Imperialist Guilds]] or the throne. During a period of retreat, wagons prepared to leave as an evacuation began to take place throughout the city. This process was interrupted when the sun darkened at midday, resulting in an entire section of the Capital being destroyed. Despite this devastation, [[Loreli]] remains desperate to reach the city.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is a location near [[Rainworth]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is a location where the [[Independents]] have fortified a hotel on its outskirts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is the largest city in the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is a location with streets and traffic.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is the location where [[Shera]] and [[Jorin]] were talking.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is mundane.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is a location where wagons are preparing for retreat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital has many companies with contracts from the throne or [[Imperialist Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is undergoing an evacuation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The sun darkened at midday over the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An entire section of the Capital was gone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Capital is a destination [[Loreli]] is desperate to reach.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|She had seen “magicians” on the streets of the Capital, claiming they could perform feats of entertaining magic for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The Captain intends to head for the Capital, ma’am.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
